description: Classic and quirk combine in this blue dial, large face watch. It transitions perfectly from day to night. The new range of  watches  are a fresh take on the  maxima  eye for perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 42 mm Case thickness: 7 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel and a black rubber strap  Ssteele logo at the 12-hour mark Tang clasp with a blue dial, metallic numbers and metallic hands Date aperture at the 3-hour mark with a lens detail on the glass over the date Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant up to 30 metres - usable while washing hands or in mild rain
